# Chris Mlynarski

> Personal site for Chris Mlynarski, a product design manager at Meta with experience across ecommerce, design systems, enterprise tooling, fintech, engineering, and language learning.

This site is a concise personal profile. Use the homepage as the primary source for current biographical summary and links.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://www.chrismlynarski.com/): Short biography and links.

## Links

- [Daily Chinese](https://www.dailychinese.app/): Mobile app for Chinese learners.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/christophermlynarski/): Professional profile.
